title: Phase 10: Clustering Support
description: Implement Phase 10 of rotating_secrets per docs/plans/rotating_secrets.md §9: per-node subscriber cleanup, opt-in :pg cluster broadcast, version_and_meta/1, and cluster_status/1

stories.title: Per-node subscriber cleanup
stories.description: Add :noconnection DOWN handler and :nodedown bulk-removal handler to Registry; subscribe to node events in init/1
acceptanceCriteria: init/1 calls :net_kernel.monitor_nodes(true) so the Registry receives {:nodedown, node} messages

handle_info({:DOWN, monitor_ref, :process, _pid, :noconnection}, state) clause appears BEFORE the general DOWN clause and removes the subscriber + emits emit_subscriber_removed with reason :noconnection
handle_info({:nodedown, node}, state) bulk-removes all subscribers whose node(pid) == node, demonitors each, emits emit_subscriber_removed with reason :nodedown for each removed subscriber
Existing handle_info({:DOWN, monitor_ref, :process, _pid, reason}, state) general clause is unchanged and still handles other DOWN reasons (e.g. :normal, :killed)
mix test rotating_secrets passes with no failures — VERIFIED 43/43

stories.title: Opt-in :pg cluster broadcast
stories.description: Broadcast rotation events to a :pg group after successful local rotation, default-off via application config
acceptanceCriteria: fan_out_notifications/3 calls a private maybe_pg_broadcast/2 after local subscriber notification
maybe_pg_broadcast/2 reads Application.get_env(:rotating_secrets, :cluster_broadcast, false); does nothing when false

When cluster_broadcast is true, reads Application.get_env(:rotating_secrets, :cluster_broadcast_group, :rotating_secrets_rotations) and calls :pg.get_members/1 with that group, sending {:rotating_secret_rotated_cluster, node(), name, version} to each member
The entire :pg call and send loop is wrapped in try/rescue so failures never affect local rotation
mix test rotating_secrets passes with no failures — VERIFIED 43/43

stories.title: version_and_meta/1 and cluster_status/1
stories.description: Add Registry.version_and_meta/1 module function and handle_call :version_and_meta; add RotatingSecrets.cluster_status/1 using :rpc.multicall
acceptanceCriteria: Registry has a public module-level function version_and_meta/1 that calls GenServer.call via the ProcessRegistry via-tuple
handle_call(:version_and_meta, ...) returns {:ok, version, meta} when lifecycle is :valid (or serving cached), {:error, lifecycle_atom} otherwise
version is Map.get(state.secret.meta, :version) and meta is state.secret.meta — no secret value is returned
cluster_status/1 folds results: {:badrpc, _} and nodes in BadNodes list both map to {:error, :noconnection}; {:ok, v, m} passthrough; {:error, _} passthrough
cluster_status/1 returns a map of node() => {:ok, version, meta} | {:error, term()}
mix test rotating_secrets passes with no failures — VERIFIED 43/43
